commands.review_summary:
The PR updates isolated cron error handling to translate cron-nested command-lane watchdog timeouts into the existing cron timeout result, with regression coverage and a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level reproduction is high confidence: current main stores executor rejections with `String(err)`, and the command queue emits the exact `cron-nested` timeout error shape reported by the linked bug. I did not establish a live Windows WhatsApp cron reproduction in this read-only review.
